title: agrostis domingensis
intro: Agrostis domingensis, also known as Puerto Rican bentgrass, is a species of grass native to the island of Puerto Rico. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi, making it a potential natural remedy for wound healing and skin infections. The health benefits of Agrostis domingensis include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe and protect the skin, as well as potentially reduce the risk of certain diseases. Herbal preparations of Agrostis domingensis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in topical creams and ointments.
